_marker: CONTRADICTION REVIEW QUEUE — computed truth vs static bindings. Resolution is HUMAN-ACK ONLY: extract/computed/resolve.ts applies computed-wins per explicitly named item; nothing auto-resolves.

items.cause: composition-owned typography: the plain/monochromePlain variants render their label through the Text primitive at bodyMd (13px/20px); the carried binding is the bodySm default — child-component props conditioned on the parent variant, invisible to single-file static promotion
